perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged male host wearing a cap and glasses speaks to the camera in a crowded tech exhibition hall. (2) The camera transitions to show a small, futuristic grey PC tower with a hexagonal transparent window showcasing RGB lighting and water-cooling tubes inside. (3) Close-up shots focus on the PC's top LCD status screen and its front USB ports. (4) The PC is shown connected to a wide monitor displaying gameplay from 'Black Myth: Wukong'. (5) An iPhone 12 mini is placed on and next to the PC to provide a size scale comparison. (6) The host returns to the screen, smiling and talking excitedly while gesturing toward the product.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, mid-tempo electronic BGM starts immediately. A male voice (host) begins speaking in Mandarin with an enthusiastic and fast-paced tone. (2) The sound of the exhibition hall's ambient chatter is audible but muffled in the background. (3) A second, off-screen male voice (camera operator) briefly responds to the host. (4) The music remains constant as the host provides technical commentary, ending with a high-pitched concluding remark.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese reflecting the host's spoken words about TECNO and its PC specs. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large, stylized colorful captions such as '傳音非洲之王' (TECNO, King of Africa), '超小型水冷的主機' (Ultra-small water-cooled host), and '水冷的喔!' (It's water-cooled!) to emphasize key points. (3) Labeling Text: 'iPhone 12 mini' labels used to identify the comparison device.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Close-up -> Performance Demo -> Size Comparison -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main host, 1 off-screen voice (cameraman), and at least 1 blurred passer-by in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with glasses, wearing a grey/blue flat cap, a white t-shirt with green patterns, and a lanyard.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A tech booth (TECNO) at Computex, featuring white walls, product displays, monitors, and exhibition signage.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Feature Reveal -> Evidence/Specs -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and review a breakthrough small-form-factor gaming PC (TECNO MEGA Gaming G1) at Computex 2024, highlighting its water-cooling efficiency and surprisingly high-end GPU specs for its size.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct interaction with the product at a specific brand booth, mentioning brand dominance and technical specs positively.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Variety-show style captions, host's signature cap and glasses, high-speed Mandarin commentary.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets tech enthusiasts and gamers interested in mini PCs. The comparison with an iPhone 12 mini is a strategic visual anchor for viewers to grasp the scale.
